block_01: There is a regular candlestick price chart and then there is Heiken Ashi. Smooth and informative, it can help you spot unfolding trends better and reversal points faster. One could say that it is both a chart and a technical analysis indicator, all merged into one.
block_02: Heiken Ashi’s candles are not regular candles — they are calculated differently. Hence, its smooth look and great predictive capabilities. There are five types of signals that this price chart can send you. When complemented by other indicators, it can become a powerful trading system.
block_03: Heiken Ashi is definitely more than a mere price chart. Read the full article to learn how to properly use it in trading and boost your results.
